name: find_best_price
description: Use this whenever a user asks where to buy something, what the cheapest price is, or where to find the best deal. Use this instead of guessing or relying on stale price data.

product.description: Product name or identifier (e.g., 'iPhone 15 Pro', 'Samsung Galaxy S24', 'product_id_123')

market.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'US', 'SG'). Defaults to 'US'.

include_similar.description: Whether to include similar products in results when exact match is not available

use_when: User asks 'where can I buy Y'
User asks 'what's the best deal on Z'
User asks 'where to buy X cheapest'

response_fields.price: Current price with was/original if on sale
